title: Initialize memory
body:
Hi, 
Honestly, i need some clarification.
Can i use the # declared functions from verilated_heavy.h?? and initialize memory
`Core__DOT__dmem__DOT__dsp`
 by using this function:
```
 extern void VL_READMEM_N(bool hex, int width, int depth, int array_lsb,
                         const std::string& ofilename,
                         void* memp, IData start, IData end) VL_MT_SAFE;
```
